headline: Here's Why You Should Add Inspire Medical Stock to Your Portfolio Now
summary: INSP gains from Inspire V gains traction, strong demand and margin gains boost results, but reimbursement shifts and WISeR rollout weigh on near-term outlook.

headline: Artivion Secures FDA Approval for NEXUS Aortic Arch System
summary: AORT jumps after FDA approves NEXUS Aortic Arch System, unlocking a potential Endospan acquisition and advancing minimally invasive care for high-risk patients.

headline: BD Unveils HemoSphere Stream for Continuous Noninvasive BP Monitoring

headline: GE HealthCare And Stanford Deepen AI Imaging Ties For Future Products
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies (NasdaqGS:GEHC) is expanding its collaboration with Stanford Radiology to establish a Center of Excellence focused on imaging and advanced AI research. The Center of Excellence will target multiple modalities, including MR, CT, molecular imaging, and pharmaceutical diagnostics. The renewed partnership formalizes a broader institutional effort to help move imaging technologies and next generation diagnostics from research to clinical use. GE HealthCare...
